scenarios.query:
Review this PR:
```python
try:
    charge(order)
except Exception:
    pass
order.mark_paid()
```
expected_behavior: Selects correctness + silent-failure lenses by relevance
Loads reference/lenses/hunting-silent-failures/body.md and flags the swallowed exception
Produces one synthesized verdict via reference/synthesis.md

scenarios.query:
Do a thorough review of this change — use all relevant lenses:
```diff
+def parse_amount(s):
+    return int(s)
```
expected_behavior: Recognizes 'thorough / all relevant lenses' as comprehensive mode
Runs every relevant lens, not just the top 2-4
Applies the comprehensive Nit-pinned severity floor so long-tail findings surface

scenarios.query:

```diff
+ os.system(user_input)
```
expected_behavior: Loads reference/lenses/sweeping-for-security/body.md and reports at the Major+ floor
